query: SELECT p.internalCode, ps.crossdockingStock FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_stock ps ON p.id = ps.productId WHERE p.internalCode IN ('BL001', 'BL003', 'BL005') LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2tDCoiftG3qjZjj.5b66511f9aa5 --database CVZ7vhL7YTVF6G9KYmzLvT --execute SELECT p.internalCode, ps.crossdockingStock FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_stock ps ON p.id = ps.productId WHERE p.internalCode IN ('BL001', 'BL003', 'BL005') LIMIT 10;
